summary: Vertical selfie-style video of the DHS Secretary, a bearded man in a white dress shirt with a clip-on microphone, speaking directly to camera in a wood-trimmed office with blue-grey walls, a window, a desk with a mug, and an upholstered chair. Burned-in caption subtitles run along the bottom of the frame (for example 'THEY'VE HELD EVERY' and 'SO MAY GOD'). The audio is him discussing the government shutdown, employees working without pay, and the President working to get DHS staff paid. No music bed.

script.scene: Bearded man in white shirt with lapel mic speaks to camera in a blue-walled wood-trimmed office; caption 'THEY'VE HELD EVERY.'
Same speaker, caption 'SO MAY GOD,' near the end of the clip.
